items.title: Why Morgan Stanley's CFO thinks tokenization is the next big step for its multi-trillion wealth business
items.summary: Morgan Stanley CFO Sharon Yeshaya says the bank is eyeing a "tokenized world" where blockchain technology allows client assets and liabilities to move more efficiently across its wealth management platform.

items.title: 'Nothing Ever Happens': This Bot Always Bets 'No' on Polymarket, And It Has a Point
items.summary: Sterling Crispin's 'Nothing Ever Happens' bot automatically buys "No" on every non-sports Polymarket it finds. It's not that crazy.

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: New Bitcoin Proposal Would Freeze Coins to Counter Quantum Threat
items.summary: The proposal would phase out Bitcoin's original security methods and freeze coins that don't move in time.

items.title: UK FCA seeks feedback on guidance for crypto rules ahead of 2027 rollout
items.summary: The UK financial regulator has launched a consultation on crypto rules covering stablecoins, trading and staking ahead of a broader UK crypto regime expected to take effect in 2027.

items.title: Can AI Beat the Sports Betting Market? 8 of the Top Models Tried
items.summary: KellyBench put Claude, GPT-5, Gemini, and Grok through a full Premier League season of betting. Not one turned a profit. Here's why.

items.title: Allbirds Stock Spikes 400% on Pivot From Shoe Brand to AI Compute—Yes, Really
items.summary: Sustainable footwear company Allbirds will rebrand as NewBird AI and enter the GPU-as-a-service market. Investors love the pivot.

items.title: Tom Lee says ‘mini crypto winter’ is over, sees Ether above $60K
items.summary: Bitmine chairman Tom Lee told Paris Blockchain Week that the recent crypto slump was a “mini crypto winter” and said Ether could climb above $60,000 over the next few years.

items.title: Allbirds abandons sneakers in pivot to AI computing, shares surge 400%
items.summary: The footwear brand plans reinvention as Newbird AI with a $50 million convertible in a sign of the broader market shift into GPU infrastructure.

items.summary: The new proposal outlines multi-year lockups and opt-in token burn, as the Trump-linked DeFi platform responds to pressure over delayed liquidity access.

items.title: TeraWulf stock declines on $900 million share sale to fund AI data center expansion
items.summary: The shares had been on a big run higher, rising more than 50% since late March.

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: AAVE rises 4.3% as trades flat
items.summary: Aptos (APT), up 3.8% since Tuesday, joined Aave (AAVE) as a top performer.

items.title: Only 4% of Danish citizens hold crypto, far below other European countries
items.summary: Only 4% of Danish citizens own crypto, far below other European countries, as banks, taxes and risk fears limit adoption, according to a new staff paper from the country's central bank.

items.title: Pakistan lifts seven-year ban, allowing banks to service crypto providers
items.summary: Pakistan sent a letter to all banks and financial regulatory firms notifying them that they may provide crypto services,, but remain barred from trading or holding crypto assets.

items.summary: Virginia signed a law bringing digital assets into unclaimed property rules, requiring in-kind transfer and limiting how quickly the state can sell them.

items.title: Pakistan allows banks to serve licensed crypto firms after years-long ban
items.summary: Pakistan’s central bank has allowed banks to open accounts for licensed virtual asset service providers, ending years of restrictions and marking a shift toward a regulated framework.
